queries:
染秋 (RAN QIU) 秋季品牌。
 品牌理念：染秋以东方哲学观照自然更迭，意在捕捉秋日流转中的诗意瞬间。品牌从中国传统"染"的工艺美学出发，将秋天的色彩、气息、情绪凝练成可感知的香氛艺术。精选秋季时令植物——桂花、柿子、枫叶、乌龙茶，融合东方香料如肉桂、檀香、琥珀，创造温暖而隽永的秋日记忆。
核心系列：    以"染秋"为题，推出桂花乌龙、琥珀枫叶、柿霜暮色等香调，营造温暖治愈的秋日氛围。
制作品牌染秋的主色 + 辅色 + 字体规范展示图

染秋 (RAN QIU) 秋季品牌。
 品牌理念：染秋以东方哲学观照自然更迭，意在捕捉秋日流转中的诗意瞬间。品牌从中国传统"染"的工艺美学出发，将秋天的色彩、气息、情绪凝练成可感知的香氛艺术。精选秋季时令植物——桂花、柿子、枫叶、乌龙茶，融合东方香料如肉桂、檀香、琥珀，创造温暖而隽永的秋日记忆。
核心系列：    以"染秋"为题，推出桂花乌龙、琥珀枫叶、柿霜暮色等香调，营造温暖治愈的秋日氛围。
制作品牌染秋的主色 + 辅色 + 字体规范展示图

scoring_dimensions.label: 意图还原度
scoring_dimensions.description: prompt 是否抓住了用户原意

final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: logo-brand
Asset type: brand style guide / color & typography specification sheet
Primary request: create a brand color palette (primary + secondary colors) and typography specification display for the fragrance brand 染秋 (RAN QIU)
Scene/backdrop: clean flat layout on off-white rice paper texture, minimal negative space, editorial design
Subject: brand identity spec sheet showing primary color swatches, secondary color swatches, and Chinese/Latin typeface pairings — all themed around an autumnal East Asian aesthetic
Style/medium: flat graphic design, editorial brand guideline illustration, ink-wash accent details
Composition/framing: portrait layout, top-down flat lay, structured grid with labeled color blocks and font specimen rows
Lighting/mood: soft diffused natural light feel, warm and serene, poetic autumn atmosphere
Color palette:
  Primary — osmanthus amber (#C8762A), persimmon orange (#D95F2B), deep maple red (#8B2E16)
  Secondary — oolong brown (#6B4226), misty celadon (#A8B89A), ink black (#1C1C1C), pale rice white (#F5EFE4)
Materials/textures: subtle rice paper grain on background, thin ink-brush divider lines between sections
Text (verbatim): "染秋", "RAN QIU", "桂花乌龙", "琥珀枫叶", "柿霜暮色", "Primary Colors", "Secondary Colors", "Typography"
Constraints: all color swatches must display hex codes and Chinese color names; typography section must show both a Chinese serif/brush-style typeface and a Latin serif typeface specimen; overall layout must feel like a premium East Asian fragrance brand guideline
Avoid: neon or overly saturated tones, Western floral clichés, cluttered layout, drop shadows

final_prompt.prompt:
为品牌「染秋 (RAN QIU)」生成一张品牌视觉规范展示图，涵盖主色、辅色与字体规范，用于品牌识别系统呈现。

风格/介质:扁平设计风格的品牌规范展示页（Brand Style Guide），融合东方美学与现代排版，气质温润隽永，参考日本品牌手册的克制与中国传统染色工艺的色彩诗意
构图:横向分区布局，从左至右依次呈现：品牌名称区、主色板区、辅色板区、字体规范区；各区域之间留有充分留白，整体版面干净有序
主体:品牌名称「染秋」与「RAN QIU」并排或上下排列，作为视觉锚点；色板以圆形或方形色块呈现，每块色下方标注色名与色值；字体规范区展示中英文字重层级
场景/背景:纯净的米白色或浅暖灰背景，营造宣纸质感的东方留白氛围
光线/氛围:无光影，平面设计，整体氛围温暖、静谧、诗意，如秋日午后的漫射光感
色彩搭配:主色以秋日植物为灵感——桂花金（暖黄）、柿橙（深橙红）、枫叶赤（砖红）；辅色以东方香料为灵感——琥珀棕、檀香米、乌龙深褐；以米白或浅暖灰作为底色，色彩之间形成温暖渐进的秋日色谱关系
材质/纹理:轻微宣纸纹理叠加在背景，色块表面哑光无反光，整体质感如染布工艺的沉稳
文字(原文保留):"染秋" "RAN QIU" "主色" "辅色" "字体规范"
约束:色板必须清晰可辨，字体规范区需展示至少两种字重对比；品牌名「染秋 (RAN QIU)」须完整出现在画面中
避免:霓虹色、高饱和撞色、西式极简冷淡风、渐变光晕、复杂插画背景、水印、多余装饰元素

final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing brand style guide sheet for 染秋 (RAN QIU), an autumn-themed Oriental fragrance brand.

Style/medium: clean flat editorial design, brand identity reference sheet, refined East-Asian typographic sensibility in the spirit of Nendo or Muji branding
Subject: brand color palette swatch block (primary + secondary colors), typography specimen showing Chinese and Latin typefaces, minimal decorative motifs drawn from osmanthus, persimmon, maple leaf, and oolong tea
Composition: portrait-oriented style guide layout, organized in clearly labeled sections — color swatches at top, typography specimen in middle, accent motif strip at bottom, generous white space
Scene/backdrop: clean off-white or warm cream background, no photographic environment
Lighting/mood: flat, even, no shadows — brand sheet aesthetic
Color palette: primary colors anchored in warm autumnal tones — deep osmanthus amber (#C8732A range), persimmon orange-red, aged oolong brown; secondary colors in muted sage, frost white, and ink black; all swatches labeled with hex codes and CMYK values
Materials/textures: subtle paper grain on background, ink-wash micro-texture on typographic headers only
Text (verbatim): "染秋" "RAN QIU" "桂花乌龙" "琥珀枫叶" "柿霜暮色"
Constraints: each color swatch must show color block + name label + hex code; typography section must show at least one Chinese serif and one Latin serif specimen; layout must read clearly at A4 print size
Avoid: photographic backgrounds, gradients as main fills, neon or cool-toned colors, generic Behance mockup chrome, drop shadows, clutter

  Primary — deep persimmon orange (#C0622A), osmanthus gold (#D4A843), amber brown (#7B4A2D)
  Secondary — misty celadon (#A8B8A0), ink grey (#4A4A4A), pale rice white (#F5EFE4), maple crimson (#8B2E1A)

Avoid: neon or synthetic colors, Western-only sans-serif coldness, cluttered layout, drop shadows

final_prompt.prompt:
为「染秋 (RAN QIU)」秋季香氛品牌生成一张品牌色彩与字体规范展示图（Brand Style Guide / Color & Typography Sheet）。

风格/介质:扁平设计规范图，东方极简美学，参考日本品牌手册的克制排版与中国传统染色工艺的色彩感知，整体气质温暖、隽永、诗意
构图:横向分区布局，左侧为主色+辅色色块展示区（含色号标注），右侧为字体规范区（中英文字体样本），顶部留品牌名标题栏，底部留品牌理念短句，充分留白
主体:主色区展示 3-4 个秋日核心色——桂花金（暖黄）、柿霜橙（砖橙）、枫叶赤（深红）、乌龙棕（深褐）；辅色区展示 2-3 个调和色——琥珀米（浅米）、檀香灰（暖灰）、墨绿（点缀）；每个色块下方标注色名（中文）+ HEX 色号；字体规范区展示中文主字体（宋体/明朝系）与英文辅助字体（衬线），含大标题、副标题、正文三级示例
场景/背景:纯净暖白或浅米色背景，模拟品牌手册印刷页面质感
光线/氛围:无光影，平面印刷感，整体氛围温暖克制，带东方秋日诗意
色彩搭配:以桂花金与柿霜橙为视觉主轴，枫叶赤作为强调色，乌龙棕与檀香灰作为中性底色，整体色调统一在秋日暖色系内
材质/纹理:轻微纸张纹理或无纹理，印刷规范图质感，不加胶片颗粒
文字(原文保留):"染秋" "RAN QIU" "桂花乌龙" "琥珀枫叶" "柿霜暮色" "染秋以东方哲学观照自然更迭，意在捕捉秋日流转中的诗意瞬间"
约束:色块必须清晰可辨，色名与色号标注完整；字体层级分明；品牌名「染秋 (RAN QIU)」在顶部标题栏逐字呈现
避免:渐变滥用、霓虹色、西方波西米亚秋色风格（南瓜橙+黑色万圣节调）、复杂插画背景、多焦点堆砌、水印

约束:色块必须清晰可辨，色名与色号标注完整；字体层级分明；品牌名「染秋 (RAN QIU)」在顶部标题栏逐字呈现

final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing brand style guide visual for 染秋 (RAN QIU), an autumn fragrance brand rooted in Eastern philosophy and traditional Chinese dyeing aesthetics.

Style/medium: clean editorial brand identity sheet, flat design with ink-wash texture accents, inspired by Japanese and Chinese minimalist graphic design studios
Composition: portrait layout, structured into three horizontal zones — primary color swatches (top), secondary/accent color swatches (middle), typography specimen (bottom); generous white space between zones
Subject: brand color system and typeface specification display for 染秋 (RAN QIU); primary palette drawn from osmanthus gold, persimmon amber, maple crimson, and oolong brown; secondary palette featuring sandalwood beige, amber resin, misty celadon, and deep ink; typeface specimens showing brand name in both Chinese and Latin scripts with size hierarchy
Scene/backdrop: off-white or warm rice-paper textured background, no photographic scene
Lighting/mood: flat, even, print-ready — no shadows or dramatic lighting; mood is quiet, poetic, autumnal warmth
Color palette: primary colors anchor around deep persimmon orange (#C0562A range), osmanthus gold (#D4A843 range), maple crimson (#8B2E2E range), oolong dark brown (#3E2A1E range); secondary colors include sandalwood beige, pale celadon mist, amber resin translucent tone; all colors evoke the "染 (dyeing)" craft — layered, saturated yet refined
Materials/textures: subtle rice-paper grain on background; ink-wash brushstroke dividers between sections; no gradients except soft watercolor wash on color chip edges
Text (verbatim): "染秋" "RAN QIU" "主色" "辅色" "字体规范"
Constraints: all color chips must be clearly labeled with name and hex-style swatch block; typeface zone must show at least two weight variants; layout must remain legible at A4 print size; brand name 染秋 and RAN QIU must appear as the header lockup
Avoid: photographic elements, 3D rendering, gradients as main design device, generic Behance flat-color grids without cultural texture, neon tones, cold blue or grey dominance
